sentences.arabic: فِي اللَّيْلَةِ الْمَاضِيَةِ، زُرْتُ مَطْعَمًا لُبْنَانِيًّا مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِي.
sentences.translation: Sinoć sam posjetio libanski restoran sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: Last night, I visited a Lebanese restaurant with my friends.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْنَا اللَّحْمَ الْمَشْوِيَّ وَالْمُقَبِّلَاتِ الشَّهِيَّةَ مِثْلَ الْحُمُّصِ وَالْمُتَبَّلِ.
sentences.translation: Naručili smo meso sa roštilja i ukusna predjela poput humusa i mutabela.
sentences.translationEn: We ordered grilled meat and delicious appetizers like hummus and mutabal.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْخِدْمَةُ سَرِيعَةً وَالْجَوُّ دَاخِلَ الْمَطْعَمِ مُرِيحًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Usluga je bila brza, a atmosfera unutar restorana veoma ugodna.
sentences.translationEn: The service was fast and the atmosphere inside the restaurant was very comfortable.
